perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a light blue fluffy bucket hat and a white/blue dress stands in a Costco aisle, excitedly holding a large transparent tray of assorted sandwiches. (2) Close-up shots of the sandwich platter reveal three types: egg salad with lettuce, ham and cheese, and a new variety featuring thick layers of meat floss (pork floss). (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining area where the same woman and another woman in a red hat sit at a table. The first woman picks up a meat floss sandwich, squeezing it to show the abundance of filling. (4) The camera focuses on the details of the meat floss spilling out, followed by a wide shot of the two women talking and gesturing with their hands while pointing at the food. (5) They are seen eating and reacting with thumb-up gestures and bright facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and excited female vocals in Mandarin dominate the start, speaking rapidly about finding the 'last box' of sandwiches at Costco. Upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi background music starts. (2) The sound of rustling plastic packaging is audible as the sandwich box is handled. The woman continues to narrate the ingredients, her tone remains enthusiastic. (3) The audio environment shifts slightly to an indoor setting with less reverb; two female voices engage in a conversation, laughing and reacting to the taste of the food. (4) The background music continues at a steady volume, maintaining a cheerful atmosphere until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '最後一盒 被我搶到' (Last box, I grabbed it) - Excited tone. (2) Functional Text: '最新新出 有肉鬆的綜合三明治' (Newest release, mixed sandwiches with meat floss) - Informative tone. (3) Decorative Text: '爆開的肉鬆' (Exploding meat floss) - Emotional/Exaggerated tone with a yellow bubble background. (4) Functional Text: '291元' (291 Yuan) and '一個只要36元' (Only 36 Yuan each) - Highlighting value. (5) Decorative Text: '我超愛' (I love it so much) with star stickers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at Costco -> Close-up product showcase -> Home tasting and review -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 female passers-by blurred in the background of the Costco scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a light blue fluffy bucket hat and a blue textured dress over a white shirt; the other wears a red Kangol bucket hat and a yellow striped shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First part shows Costco shelves with refrigerated food items and price tags. Second part shows a home interior with a white wall, a table, and some household items in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting (supermarket) and warm home lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Discovery -> Product Demonstration -> Sensory Evaluation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and food review vlog intended to share a value-for-money product discovery at Costco. It leverages the 'last box' scarcity hook and visual evidence of generous food portions (the meat floss sandwich) to persuade viewers of the product's quality and cost-effectiveness.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product labels, price breakdown, and highly positive reaction to the specific retailer's house brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration, use of colorful floating text bubbles, and specific bucket hat styling.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows standard short-form content trends for food reviews in Taiwan, focusing on the 'CP value' (cost-performance ratio) which is highly resonant with the local audience.
